title: Crunchy Santiago Shrimp Stir Fry
description: A Chinese-inspired stir fry with succulent shrimp, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Spanish flair.

ingredients.name: De Santiago Crunchy Tortilla Strips (or substitute with chow mein noodles)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Spanish onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the soy sauce, oyster sauce (if using), and sesame oil. Stir to combine.
Add the crunchy tortilla strips (or chow mein noodles) and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes, until combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately and garnish with green onions, if desired.
